---
title: "About"
subtitle: "IS428 Visual Analytics — Group 10 | SMU AY2025/26 Term 2"
---

## The Team

This project was completed as part of **IS428 Visual Analytics** at Singapore Management University (SMU), AY2025/26 Term 2.

**Group 10**

| Name | Student ID | Role |
|---|---|---|
| Marcus Chew | e0175704 | Data pipeline, Tableau dashboards, Quarto website |
| *(teammate)* | — | *(role)* |
| *(teammate)* | — | *(role)* |

---

## The Project

**Course:** IS428 Visual Analytics
**Institution:** Singapore Management University (SMU)
**Programme:** Bachelor of Science (Information Systems)
**Term:** AY2025/26 Term 2
**Deadline:** 19 April 2026

**Challenge:** VAST Challenge 2025, Mini-Challenge 2 — Detecting Bias in COOTEFOO

---

## Tools Used

| Tool | Purpose |
|---|---|
| Python 3 (`pandas`, `numpy`) | Data transformation and preparation |
| Gephi | Bipartite knowledge graph visualisation |
| Tableau Desktop | Interactive visual analytics dashboards |
| Quarto | Project website |
| GitHub | Version control and hosting |
| Vercel | Website deployment |

---

## Data Sources

All data originates from the VAST Challenge 2025 Mini-Challenge 2 dataset:

- `mc2_FILAH_nodes.csv` / `mc2_FILAH_links.csv`
- `mc2_TROUT_nodes.csv` / `mc2_TROUT_links.csv`
- `mc2_jounalist_nodes.csv` / `mc2_journalist_links.csv`
- `mc2_geo_nodes.csv` / `mc2_geo_edges.csv`

The data is fictional and created for the purposes of the VAST Challenge educational competition.

---

## Acknowledgements

We thank our IS428 instructor for guidance throughout the project, and our booth evaluators from the 13 April 2026 poster session for their constructive feedback.
